title: Invitation Homes Names Senior Vice President, Legal
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or “the Company”) announced today that John D. Huh has joined the Company as senior vice president, Legal. Huh brings more than 15 years of experience in alternate dispute resolution, investigations, litigation, compliance, and corporate transactions. In this role, he will formulate and execute legal strategy and will be responsible for management of the Company's litigation matters. "As the nation's premier home le
